untranslatable_reason: Signal requires specialized commodity-specific indicators not in allowed set: (1) inventory percentile tracking (2-year historical range), (2) production pipeline lead time measurements, (3) storage cost ratio to commodity price. These are domain-specific metrics requiring external data sources beyond standard OHLCV technical indicators. Proxy conditions used: price_pos_20 approximates inventory percentile via price position in range, hvol_20 captures volatility aspect, returns captures demand growth volatility. However, the core logic of pipeline adjustment speed and storage cost ratio cannot be accurately represented with available indicators.
translation_notes: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction interpreted as LONG entry on shortage signals. Mapped 'inventory <30th percentile' to price_pos_20 < 0.30 as range proxy. Mapped 'demand growth >2 std dev' to returns > 0.02 (approximately 2% return as volatility proxy). Mapped exit condition 'inventory returns to 50th percentile' to price_pos_20 >= 0.50. Pipeline lead time (90+ days) and storage cost thresholds cannot be expressed with available indicators and would require custom data feeds.
